item.name: Permit
item.description:
This large saltwater fish roams the waters near the For'ard Cabins, where it enjoys a diet of crustaceans and smaller, slower sea creatures.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This cautious wavekin's broad silver body is speckled with inky black spots. The slightest hint of a predator is enough to send this timid specimen darting off to the relative safety of a rocky crevasse or other shaded spot.
